name: tdd-bdd-agent
description: TDD/BDD agent — implements kata features using strict RED-GREEN-REFACTOR discipline, one test at a time

postToolUse.command: docker run --rm -v $(pwd):/app -w /app kata-tests pytest tests/ -v --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -20 || pytest tests/ -v --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -20
